{{Infobox artifact
| name = Moonlight Bridge
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

''See also: [[Moonlight Bridge Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The Moonlight [[Bridge]] is a [[Divine Treasure]] capable of providing nearly instantaneous transportation to almost any location across the world. This [[construct]], which received significant personal attention from [[Reigan Shen]] during its creation, was integrated into [[Yerin's spirit]] with ease. While it allows for frequent use when traveling short distances within sight, the ability is subject to specific limitations: [[Yerin]] cannot transport other people with her, and using it for long-distance travel requires a recovery period of up to three days. Using the treasure can also result in profound soul-deep fatigue and physical exhaustion. In combat, it manifests as flashes of white or moonlight, allowing the user to appear and disappear rapidly to evade attacks or reposition. Although it is difficult to track, its activation can be influenced or redirected by powerful individuals.}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Located within [[Yerin's spirit]], the Moonlight [[Bridge]] is a [[construct]] that allows her to disappear and reappear or dodge attacks. While it can be used as frequently as desired when traveling within sight, moving all the way around the world requires up to three days of recovery and prevents her from bringing anyone else along. [[Ruby]] once utilized the bridge to run off, but [[Yerin]] later used its power to appear suddenly at Sophara's throat. Although the bridge can make [[Yerin's spirit]] glow brightly and can be restored by [[Northstrider]], she ultimately decided not to use it for movement during certain encounters. Instead, she utilized the [[construct]] as a means to join the fight.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">13</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Moonlight Bridge]] cannot be used to bring anyone else along for the ride.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23">''Wintersteel'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Moonlight Bridge]] takes up to three days to recover if used to move all the way around the world.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Moonlight Bridge]] can be used as much as desired when traveling within sight.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Moonlight Bridge]] is located in [[Yerin's spirit]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Ruby]] used the [[Moonlight Bridge]] to run off.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c24">''Wintersteel'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Moonlight Bridge]] can be restored by [[Northstrider]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Moonlight Bridge]] can be used by [[Yerin]] to return in a flash.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Moonlight Bridge]] can make [[Yerin's spirit]] glow bright.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Moonlight Bridge]] can be used to disappear and reappear.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] used the [[Moonlight Bridge]] to dodge.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] decided not to use the [[Moonlight Bridge]] to move.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26">''Wintersteel'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] used the [[Moonlight Bridge]] to appear at Sophara's throat.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Moonlight Bridge]] is a [[construct]] [[Yerin]] can use to join the fight.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Moonlight Bridge]] is a technique used by [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6">''Bloodline'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]] can activate the [[Moonlight Bridge]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17">''Bloodline'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Moonlight Bridge]] began to activate.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18">''Bloodline'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin]] may have taken the [[Moonlight Bridge]] back.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c2">''Reaper'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Moonlight Bridge]] can make it difficult to find [[Yerin Arelius]] once she flees.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin]]'s [[Moonlight Bridge]] wraps her in white light to transport her.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c13">''Reaper'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The Moonlight [[Bridge]] is a transport technique utilized by [[Yerin]] that requires a specific restoration period after use. While the method can be tracked in principle, doing so remains a difficult task for others to achieve. The technique is effective even when operating within the [[scripts]] of the [[Sage of Red Faith]] and can be employed whenever a spatial lock is disrupted. [[Yerin]] considered using this method to facilitate transport into the cloud fortress and eventually readied the technique for use.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">7</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]]'s [[Moonlight Bridge]] has a restoration period.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Moonlight Bridge]] can be used while a spatial lock is disrupted.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7">''Dreadgod'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Moonlight Bridge]] is a technique that can be tracked in principle but is difficult to do so.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c11">''Dreadgod'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]]'s [[Moonlight Bridge]] works even inside the [[Sage of Red Faith]]'s [[scripts]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c14">''Dreadgod'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Moonlight Bridge]] is a method of transport into the cloud fortress.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] readied her [[Moonlight Bridge]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c15">''Dreadgod'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Moonlight Bridge]] is a technique [[Yerin]] considered using.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19">''Dreadgod'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The Moonlight [[Bridge]] is a [[Divine Treasure]] artifact belonging to [[Yerin]] that serves as a means of transportation. While [[Lindon]] once found himself without access to such a tool, [[Yerin]] possesses her own version which was created with the assistance of [[Reigan Shen]]. Access to this bridge can be granted by the Daughter of the [[Destroyer]]. During its use, [[Yerin]]'s Moonlight [[Bridge]] has been known to sputter white light.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">8</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Moonlight Bridge]] is used for transportation.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c8">''Waybound'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] does not have the [[Moonlight Bridge]] available for transport.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c11">''Waybound'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]]'s [[Moonlight Bridge]] was created with the help of [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13">''Waybound'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Moonlight Bridge]] is a [[Divine Treasure]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The Daughter of the [[Destroyer]] can grant access to the [[Moonlight Bridge]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14">''Waybound'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] has a [[Moonlight Bridge]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18">''Waybound'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]]'s [[Moonlight Bridge]] sputtered white light.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19">''Waybound'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Moonlight Bridge]] is an artifact belonging to [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30">''Waybound'', chapter 30</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“Renew,” he commanded, and Yerin could feel the Moonlight Bridge in her spirit glow bright again.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“Daughter of the Destroyer, grant me access to your Moonlight Bridge.”<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
